emiratesid.ae.biometrics
Class FTP_Image

java.lang.Object
  emiratesid.ae.biometrics.FTP_Image

public class FTP_Image
extends java.lang.Object

Copyright (c) 2010 LOGICA. All Rights Reserved.
This class represents the fingerprint image captured from any sensor

Since:
1.6
Version:
2.0
Author:
Hakim SEBSSI

          Retrieves the current image height

          Get the BMP Image raw data of the captured fingerprint

          Returns the Quality of the image captured

          Indicates if the image already loaded

Method Detail

getFingerIndex

public int getFingerIndex()
Get the Finger Index of the captured fingerprint

Returns:
index of the finger, see FingerIndexType class

setFingerIndex

public void setFingerIndex(int fingerIndex)
Set the Finger Index attribute

Parameters:
fingerIndex -

getHeight

public int getHeight()
Retrieves the current image height

Returns:
image height

setHeight

public void setHeight(int height)
Sets the image height Used internally

Parameters:
height - image height

getPixels

public char[] getPixels()
Get the BMP Image raw data of the captured fingerprint

Returns:
the image in char array

setPixels

public void setPixels(char[] pixels)
Sets image pixels Used internally

Parameters:
pixels - image pixels

getWidth

public int getWidth()
Retrieves current image width

Returns:
image width

setWidth

public void setWidth(int width)
Sets current image width Used internally

Parameters:
width - image width

getInstance

public static FTP_Image getInstance(java.lang.String path,
                                    int fingerIndex)
Construct FTP_Image object from a file system

Parameters:
path - the path to the file containing the fingerprint
fingerIndex - finger index
Returns:
FTP_Image object

getQuality

public int getQuality()
Returns the Quality of the image captured

Returns:
a value between 0 and 100, usually above 70, the quality is good

setQuality

public void setQuality(int quality)
Sets the current image quality Used internally

Parameters:
quality - image quality

isImageLoaded

public boolean isImageLoaded()
Indicates if the image already loaded

Returns:
true if image is loaded
